title: Topic: ONE Friday Fights 148ONE Friday Fights 148

posts.author: Tapology
posts.content: The official Tapology discussion thread for the event!

posts.author: AlbertEinstein
posts.content:
Predictions: 0 of 2 Winners, 0 Perfect, 0 Points
|
Tied for 1st with 252 others

Rizoev vs. Silva
Sattor Rizoev, DEC
Flyweight vs Bantamweight: Rizoev appears to be the better-equipped fighter with the typical dagestani-blueprint which I like for him. Although, it will be harder to keep that same gameplan as Silva has the natural weight-advantage. I can see Felipe getting a freak knockout with his power, but otherwise this fight goes to Rizoev. 30-27 Rizoev

Danh vs. Tanaka
Kotaro Tanaka, SUB, R2
Despite my gut instinct going for Danh, I think Kotaro will come back from a year-long hiatus better than before and take Danh out. I think Danh will have a better chance the longer this fight goes, he has went the distance in the past and has proven he can win in rematches, albeit a doctor stoppage.
